privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env model_wind_turbine_aep task by confirming that the prerequisite wind resource data comes from real-world .srw files bundled with the NREL SAM installation, while the power curve parameters are explicitly provided in the prompt. Verified that the expected target capacity (1500 kW), hub height (80m), and rotor diameter (77m) exactly match the task instructions. The Annual Energy Production (AEP) bounds (1.5M-7.0M) perfectly align with the 10%-55% Capacity Factor (CF) bounds for a 1.5 MW turbine. Discovered a critical defect: verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
